overview: WE ARE ONE is a vibrant festival website showcasing global EDM and family festivals across the UK, Europe, Americas, and Asia. The platform features a stunning Tomorrowland-style public site with all festival info, ticket packages, jobs, and a contact page — plus a powerful admin dashboard for managing festivals, uploads, and analytics.
features: Home page with animated hero, logo, slogan and featured festivals
Festivals page listing all 11 Summer & Winter events with filters
Packages page with ticket tiers, VIP, flights, transfers, and accommodation
Jobs page with roles, age eligibility, and application info
Contact page with inquiry form, map, and social links
Admin dashboard with full CRUD for festivals and packages
Festival image and lineup uploads via file storage
Toggle festival status between Coming Soon and Active
Analytics per festival: revenue estimates, attendance, and sales
Coming Soon popup on all ticket purchase buttons
Fully responsive design with LED fonts and animated festival visuals
